description: Implement a cross-question validation rule in the 'Household Financial Wellness 2025' survey (admin / Admin123!). Configure the 'Q_EXPENSES' question so that the sum of all expense sub-questions cannot exceed the reported 'Total Monthly Income' (Q_INCOME). The validation must ensure sum(Q_EXPENSES) <= Q_INCOME and include a dynamic validation tip: 'Total expenses cannot exceed your reported income of {Q_INCOME}.'
